metadata.publisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI), Sample Registration System
metadata.method: Verbal-autopsy cause assignment on the SRS sample. Unlike MCCD (only ~22% medically certified, urban/institutional), SRS-CoD is nationally representative and covers rural and at-home deaths. Most ill-defined causes are at ages 70+.
metadata.label: Communicable (men)
